testcase.name: test_demo_user_login
testcase.failure: tests/test_email_verification.py:144: in test_demo_user_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Incorrect email or password"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
